text: A dark, low-angle photograph of a building facade. The foreground shows two dark, corrugated metal garage doors. Above the doors, a white wall features a small, striped awning over a window and a doorway. A rough, textured stone or concrete pillar is visible on the left side. The scene is dimly lit, suggesting dusk or night.
